content: Nice puzzle requiring knowledges or arrays and indexes!

Output
* Please replace the entire current description with the following:

<<[[w]] lines>>: The cut cake. Each line must contain exactly [[l]] characters of {{#}} or {{|}}.

Input
* Please add "An integer" before l, w and f.

Goal
* Please add:

The cake must be cut vertically, and cannot be cut horizontally.

Every slice of cake will always be the same size. In reality, the cut positions may occur between cake units (for example, at position 3.25). Since the output uses fixed-width characters, the exact positions of the cuts cannot be shown.

Instead, represent each cut by marking the cake unit that the cut passes through. For example, a cut at position 3.25 should be represented by marking the 4th unit of cake.

Use the following characters in the output:
• a {{#}} for a unit of uncut cake.
• a {{|}} for a unit of cake cut across vertically.

Constraints
* Please change 11 to 10.

* Please delete the 3rd and 4th constraints.

* Please add:
When [[f]] > 1, [[l]] is never a multiple of [[f]]. Therefore, cuts will never occur exactly between two cake units.

Thanks.
Great, thanks for your feedback, I've now updated the contribution.

Nice!

I've thought about it again, and changed the last constraint to state that [[l]] and [[f]] are always coprime. That's more accurate than the "multiple" constraint.

Cases
* Please add a pair of cases where the same unit of cake is cut several times (e.g. [[l]] = 3 and [[f]] = 10).

Thanks.
Please revise Validator 6 so that the same unit of cake is cut several times too (e.g. [[l]] / [[f]] < 0.5), similar to Test 6. Thanks.
Thank you for your feedback, I have revised this testset.
The length of the expected outputs for Test 6 and Validator 6 are wrong. Please fix those and your solution. Thanks.
